title: Chris Bridge
description: England & Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Chris Bridge (5 July 1984) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played as a centre, stand-off and scrum-half in the 2000s and 2010s. 
He played for the Bradford Bulls, Warrington Wolves and the Widnes Vikings in the Super League, and on loan from Warrington at the Swinton Lions in the Championship. He played at international level for Ireland and England.
